competitorUpdates.ATT: AT&T raising legacy plan prices AGAIN in April 2026 ($10-20/month increases). At least the 4th increase in about 2 years. Still no streaming perks on any plan.
competitorUpdates.Verizon: Verizon still requires trade-in for best phone deals. T-Mobile's top deals are no trade-in required for switchers.

biggestThreat.why: AT&T April price hikes will drive frustrated customers to shop around — but they may also consider Verizon. Need to intercept with clear value messaging.
biggestThreat.counterStrategy: Lead with 5-Year Price Guarantee and the $3,700 savings stat. AT&T is raising prices for the 4th time in 2 years — T-Mobile locks your rate. Plus free iPhone 17, no trade-in.

biggestOpportunity.description: AT&T April price hike driving switcher traffic + expanded device lineup (iPhone Air, Pixel 10a, Z Flip7/Fold7)
biggestOpportunity.targetCustomer: AT&T customers seeing $10-20/mo price increases on their April bill, plus tech enthusiasts interested in iPhone Air and foldables
biggestOpportunity.pitch: Tired of AT&T raising your bill? Switch to T-Mobile — we'll give you a free iPhone 17 (no trade-in), pay off your old phone up to $800, and lock your price for 5 years. Plus Netflix, Hulu, and Apple TV+ included.
